name: Telekinetic
description: You increase your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20. You learn the Mage Hand spell, which you can cast without verbal or somatic components and make invisible, with its range increased by 30 feet. As a bonus action, you can telekinetically shove a creature within 30 feet; the target must succeed on a Strength saving throw (DC 8 + your spellcasting ability modifier + your proficiency bonus) or be moved 5 feet toward or away from you. The spellcasting ability for these effects is the ability increased by this feat.
